## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly pod stand-up to discuss client updates, workflow improvements, and address team concerns.](https://fathom.video/share/4gPUmqD92bNxJZXi5R8xaqTUyEMZqk2x?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Aftershoots engagement ending due to poor fit; team to deliver reduced scope of 40 articles by end of August](https://fathom.video/share/4gPUmqD92bNxJZXi5R8xaqTUyEMZqk2x?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Team encouraged to use Claude AI in parallel with Atlas for better article generation and editing](https://fathom.video/share/4gPUmqD92bNxJZXi5R8xaqTUyEMZqk2x?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [New clients (e.g., Sunbit) coming soon; Ehtisham to manage Sunbit portfolio](https://fathom.video/share/4gPUmqD92bNxJZXi5R8xaqTUyEMZqk2x?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
  - [Publishing automation and workflow improvements in progress, including potential API integration for Yurco](https://fathom.video/share/4gPUmqD92bNxJZXi5R8xaqTUyEMZqk2x?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)

## Topics

### Client Updates

  - [Aftershoots engagement ending:](https://fathom.video/share/4gPUmqD92bNxJZXi5R8xaqTUyEMZqk2x?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
      - [GrowthX's decision due to poor client fit](https://fathom.video/share/4gPUmqD92bNxJZXi5R8xaqTUyEMZqk2x?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
      - [Reduced scope: 40 articles by end of August](https://fathom.video/share/4gPUmqD92bNxJZXi5R8xaqTUyEMZqk2x?tab=summary&timestamp=41.0)
      - [Demonstrates GrowthX's ability to end non-beneficial partnerships](https://fathom.video/share/4gPUmqD92bNxJZXi5R8xaqTUyEMZqk2x?tab=summary&timestamp=55.0)
  - [New client Sunbit coming on board:](https://fathom.video/share/4gPUmqD92bNxJZXi5R8xaqTUyEMZqk2x?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
      - [Two-week temporary takeover, then permanent shift to GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/4gPUmqD92bNxJZXi5R8xaqTUyEMZqk2x?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
      - [Ehtisham to manage Sunbit portfolio](https://fathom.video/share/4gPUmqD92bNxJZXi5R8xaqTUyEMZqk2x?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)

### Workflow Improvements

  - [Team encouraged to use Claude AI alongside Atlas:](https://fathom.video/share/4gPUmqD92bNxJZXi5R8xaqTUyEMZqk2x?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
      - [Claude more effective at applying writing guidelines and making specific changes](https://fathom.video/share/4gPUmqD92bNxJZXi5R8xaqTUyEMZqk2x?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
      - [Gemini useful for technical content (e.g., Aimbid project)](https://fathom.video/share/4gPUmqD92bNxJZXi5R8xaqTUyEMZqk2x?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
      - [Google Docs integration with Gemini for quick edits](https://fathom.video/share/4gPUmqD92bNxJZXi5R8xaqTUyEMZqk2x?tab=summary&timestamp=605.0)
  - [Atlas improvements in progress:](https://fathom.video/share/4gPUmqD92bNxJZXi5R8xaqTUyEMZqk2x?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
      - [Agentic workflow showing promise (used by Town)](https://fathom.video/share/4gPUmqD92bNxJZXi5R8xaqTUyEMZqk2x?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
      - [Need for final proofreading/quality checking step](https://fathom.video/share/4gPUmqD92bNxJZXi5R8xaqTUyEMZqk2x?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [Potential vector database implementation for better internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/4gPUmqD92bNxJZXi5R8xaqTUyEMZqk2x?tab=summary&timestamp=776.0)

### Publishing and Automation

  - [Suleiman to gradually take on publishing tasks across clients](https://fathom.video/share/4gPUmqD92bNxJZXi5R8xaqTUyEMZqk2x?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
  - [Prophecy articles: Saskia to schedule manually for now](https://fathom.video/share/4gPUmqD92bNxJZXi5R8xaqTUyEMZqk2x?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
  - [Engine publishing automation in pipeline (ticket created)](https://fathom.video/share/4gPUmqD92bNxJZXi5R8xaqTUyEMZqk2x?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)
  - [Yurco/Prismic publishing:](https://fathom.video/share/4gPUmqD92bNxJZXi5R8xaqTUyEMZqk2x?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
      - [API integration impossible due to lack of publishing authority](https://fathom.video/share/4gPUmqD92bNxJZXi5R8xaqTUyEMZqk2x?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
      - [Manual review still necessary](https://fathom.video/share/4gPUmqD92bNxJZXi5R8xaqTUyEMZqk2x?tab=summary&timestamp=1357.0)
      - [Potential for improved link checking through pipeline integration](https://fathom.video/share/4gPUmqD92bNxJZXi5R8xaqTUyEMZqk2x?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)

### Team Collaboration and Learning

  - [Encouragement to share prompting techniques and learn from each other](https://fathom.video/share/4gPUmqD92bNxJZXi5R8xaqTUyEMZqk2x?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
  - [Emphasis on asking questions and sharing knowledge across different skill areas (e.g., analytics, reporting)](https://fathom.video/share/4gPUmqD92bNxJZXi5R8xaqTUyEMZqk2x?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
  - [Exploration of AI tools for analytics reporting (e.g., using Claude with GA4 and GSC data)](https://fathom.video/share/4gPUmqD92bNxJZXi5R8xaqTUyEMZqk2x?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Darrell to create ticket for Suleiman to start adding publishing tasks to his queue](https://fathom.video/share/4gPUmqD92bNxJZXi5R8xaqTUyEMZqk2x?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
  - [Saskia to schedule Prophecy articles manually in the interim](https://fathom.video/share/4gPUmqD92bNxJZXi5R8xaqTUyEMZqk2x?tab=summary&timestamp=1177.0)
  - [Carrie to obtain API key from Jessica for Yurco/Prismic integration attempt](https://fathom.video/share/4gPUmqD92bNxJZXi5R8xaqTUyEMZqk2x?tab=summary&timestamp=1323.0)
  - [Team to continue providing feedback on Atlas workflows and generation quality](https://fathom.video/share/4gPUmqD92bNxJZXi5R8xaqTUyEMZqk2x?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Explore use of Claude, Gemini, and GPT-4 for various content creation and editing tasks](https://fathom.video/share/4gPUmqD92bNxJZXi5R8xaqTUyEMZqk2x?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)
